channel.title: Software-Development on Dario Di Pasquale
channel.description: Recent content in Software-Development on Dario Di Pasquale

item.title: Introduction to Domain-Driven Design (DDD)
item.description: Designing software nowadays can be such a tough job, we know. Software complexity has raised and it is still raising reaching summits above the havoc. All this wave of fe…

item.title: Rust: fear => love => hate => love => disillusion
item.description: My journey through Rusthttps://www.rust-lang.org/ was very tortuous and tormented. During this article, I want to retrace my steps towards the discovery of that language

item.title: Find duplicates using Python
item.description: The exercise of finding duplicates in a list is a classical example of a didactic problem that you may find during your journey through learning algorithms.

item.title: False Sharing — An example with Go
item.description: False Sharing — An example with Go Diving in multiprocessor programming
